Video.summary: Imogene Coca and Vic Damone appear in sketches about air travel, taboo commercials, and "The Old Folks"
Video.title: Imogene Coca, Vic Damone

Video.summary: In "The Family", Ed is going on an out-of-town trip...but Eunice and Mickey want to come along.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Ross Martin & Martha Raye guest! Martha & Carol play mismatched jurors, and Ross is in "Storefront Hospital."
Video.title: Martha Raye, Ross Martin

Video.summary: Guest stars Bing Crosby and Paul Lynde take a trip to Canoga Falls in tonight's "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Bing Crosby, Paul Lynde

Video.summary: Jonathan Winters returns as Carol's guest, highlighted by a dual role in "The Wonderful World Of Hospitals."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Jonathan Winters, Dionne Warwick

Video.summary: Ruth Buzzi and Richard Crenna take part in a salute to the "bad girls" of cinema.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Ruth Buzzi, Richard Crenna

Video.summary: Guest stars Bernadette Peters, Nancy Wilson, and The Burgundy Street Singers.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Nancy Wilson, Bernadette Peters

Video.summary: Jim Nabors returns for his eleventh and final season premiere guest star spot!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Vincent Price stars in a salute to horror. George imagines he is gambler, & a pregnant pause on "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Vincent Price

Video.summary: Sketches include an escaped convict seeking refuge in a diner, plus Carol and Vicki as robots.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: John Byner, Francine Beers

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence stars in a take-off on film "Double Indemnity"..here named "Double Calamity", with Carol too.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Carol & Harvey are quarreling dolls in "Barby and Ben". Carol takes aim with spoof, "Rancid Harvest."
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: William Conrad & Isabel Sanford star! Short spoofs highlight this episode, which also features "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: William Conrad, Isabel Sanford

Video.summary: Paul Lynde and Peggy Lee are tonight's guests!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Paul Lynde, Peggy Lee

Video.summary: Roddy McDowell guest stars! He plays a member of "The Family." Also: movie spoof "The Lady Heir."
Video.title: Roddy McDowell

Video.summary: Spoofs of classic movies abound, including "Ninotchka", "Blackboard Jungle", "Gone With The Wind", and more.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Chita Rivera, Bob Newhart

Video.summary: Paul Lynde plays a smarmy insurance salesman, and later appears on "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Dyan Cannon, Paul Lynde

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence & Tim Conway star! Steve plays a talk show host, then solves a mystery in a spoof with Tim.
Video.title: Tim Conway, Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Carol's guests are Mickey Rooney and John Davidson!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Mickey Rooney, John Davidson

Video.summary: The Pointer Sisters join Carol in a rockin' musical spoof of "Cinderella" in tonight's episode.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Pointer Sisters

Video.summary: Imogene Coca joins Carol, while Harvey and Carol interview with Miss America and the parody "Bonnie And Clod."
Video.title: Imogene Coca

Video.summary: Martha Raye and Mel Torme guest star! Martha appears in "The Sunday Painters". Mel and Martha join parodies.
Video.title: Martha Raye, Mel Torme

Video.summary: Guest Gloria Swanson arrives for the Q&A...but she only has eyes for Lyle.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Gloria Swanson

Video.summary: Bing Crosby and Rowan Martin guest! Bing's sketch is set in Brown Derby, while the "Laugh-In" boys are crooks.
Video.title: Bing Crosby, Rowan & Martin

Video.summary: Jerry Lewis guests as an awkward groom set up for a society marriage. Also: another day with "The Old Folks."
Video.title: Jerry Lewis

Video.summary: Guest Richard Chamberlain stars in "Gone With The Breeze". In "Carol & Sis", it's one sibling too many.
Video.title: Dick Chamberlain, Kay Medford

Video.summary: Guest Lucille Ball joins Carol for "The Rock Sisters!" George Carlin is on hand with words that you CAN say.
Video.title: Lucille Ball, George Carlin

Video.summary: Flip Wilson and Vikki Carr accept Carol's mission: appear in "Mission: Improbable"...which includes a cameo!
Video.title: Flip Wilson, Vikki Carr

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence & Paul Sand guest. Paul plays a man seeking confidence, and Steve joins "The Putrified Forest."
Video.title: Steve Lawrence, Paul Sand

Video.summary: Scoey Mitchell is Carol's guest. Featuring "The Queen Elizabeth Show", a Q&A and a "Queen & Sis" sketch.
Video.title: Scoey Mitchell

Video.summary: Jim Nabors guests. Features Harvey's Emmy Award speech, and a presentation of "Hollywood Canteen."
Video.title: Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Telly Savalas guests! Telly and Harvey play businessmen. Also: TV commercials, and Telly as "Poopi Le Moko."
Video.title: Telly Savalas

Video.summary: Andy Griffith guests, retelling a familiar Aesop tale, then joining Carol for a musical number: "Cinderellie."
Video.title: Andy Griffith

Video.summary: David Frost and Marilyn Horne star. Frost plays a Rolls Royce dealer, while Horne takes the musical spotlight.
Video.title: Marilyn Horne, David Frost
